name: Favorite Cheesecake Squares (Kuley)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F.
2. Beat margarine and brown sugar together until light and fluffy.
3. Add flour and walnuts; mix well.
4. Reserve half of the crumb mixture. Press the remaining into the bottom of an 8-inch square pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
6. Combine cream cheese, granulated sugar, and vanilla in a bowl. Mix until well blended.
7. Add egg; mix well.
8. Layer half of the Smarties or M&Ms over the crust.
9. Top with the cream cheese mixture.
10. Sprinkle the remaining candy and reserved crumb mixture over the top.
11. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
12. Cool.
